config.title: Language Check
config.core.channel: Which core binary channel to use.
config.core.binaryPath: Custom path to the language-check-server binary. Overrides the channel setting.
config.trace.enable: Enable Protobuf message tracing to the output channel.
config.performance.hpm: Low-resource mode: disables LanguageTool and external providers, simplifies SpeedFix UI rendering.
walkthrough.title: Get Started with Language Check
walkthrough.description: Learn how to check and fix prose in your documents.
walkthrough.check.title: Check Your Writing
walkthrough.check.description:
Open a Markdown, HTML, or LaTeX file and save it to automatically check for grammar, spelling, and style issues.

[Check Current Document](command:language-check.checkDocument)
walkthrough.speedfix.title: SpeedFix: Batch Fix Issues
walkthrough.speedfix.description:
Press **Alt+F** to open the SpeedFix panel and review all diagnostics at once. Apply fixes, ignore issues, or add words to the dictionary.

[Open SpeedFix](command:language-check.openSpeedFix)
walkthrough.language.title: Switch Language
walkthrough.language.description:
Click the language indicator in the Status Bar (bottom right) to switch between English, German, French, and Spanish.

[Select Language](command:language-check.selectLanguage)
walkthrough.configure.title: Configure Rules
walkthrough.configure.description: Create a `.languagecheck.yaml` in your workspace root to disable rules, add auto-fix patterns, or configure engines. See the [documentation](https://github.com) for details.
